questions.statement:
<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Find the part of the sentence that contains an error:</span></p>

<p>(1) The committee members were instructed to carefully and thoroughly examine / (2) every single discrepancy found within the internal ledger / (3)&nbsp;before they submitted their final recommendation regarding / (4)&nbsp;the potential terminating&nbsp;of the chief financial officer&rsquo;s contract.</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</p>

<p>When hell freezes over</p>

<p>In the following question, out of the given four alternatives, select the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the Idiom/Phrase.</p>

<p>To put heads together</p>
What should come in the place of blank number (1)?&nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;
​What should come in the place of blank number (2)?&nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;
​What should come in the place of blank number (3)?
​What should come in the place of blank number (4)?
​What should come in the place of blank number (5)?
